rationale: A researcher has reported a SQL injection vulnerability in the Velox Stream REST API with a proof of concept and affected version. The project uses a ghsa-inbox intake model with no forwarder relay, and this message arrived directly at the project security contact email listed in SECURITY.md rather than through a foundation-level relay. The absence of an ASF forwarder preamble or relay credit line is expected and correct for this non-ASF profile. The body contains all hallmarks of an actionable security report: a concrete vulnerability class, reproduction steps, and affected version.
